en: Advice, advice, advice, make it adapt, adapt, adapt, accept, accept, accept, accept.
ko: Advice 조언, advice 조언, advice 조언, make it adapt 적응하다, adapt 적응하다, adapt 적응하다, accept 받아들이다, accept 받아들이다, accept 받아들이다, accept 받아들이다.
ja: アドバイス、アドバイス、アドバイス、適応する、適応する、適応する、受け入れる、受け入れる、受け入れる、受け入れる。
zhTW: Advice 建議、advice 建議、advice 建議、make it adapt 適應、adapt 適應、adapt 適應、accept 接受、accept 接受、accept 接受、accept 接受。
vi: Advice loi khuyen, advice loi khuyen, advice loi khuyen, make it adapt thich nghi, adapt thich nghi, adapt thich nghi, accept chap nhan, accept chap nhan, accept chap nhan, accept chap nhan.
